case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INS. CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INS. CO. PUCCINELLI BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INS. CO. PUCCINELLI BAIL BONDS $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,080.00
ORDER SETTING ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, REINSTATING BAIL AND EXONERATING BAIL.
